message:
fix: set sync.mode in DB during dolt migrate/fix-metadata (gt-dookzl)

ShouldExportJSONL reads sync.mode from the database only (not config.yaml).
When migrating to dolt-native, sync.mode was set in config.yaml but not
propagated to the DB, causing every bd write to trigger a full JSONL export
(10-25s penalty per operation, 25s+ for gt handoff).

Now gt dolt migrate and gt dolt fix-metadata both call
'bd sync mode set dolt-native' for all rig databases after completing
their work, ensuring the DB config matches config.yaml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
